profile.summary: Customer Support Team Lead with 8 years of experience in SaaS and e-commerce support. Led a team of 11 agents handling 9,000 tickets per month and improved customer satisfaction (CSAT) from 84 to 93 percent.

experiences.title: Customer Support Team Lead
experiences.description: Led a front-line support team for a B2B SaaS platform across email, chat and phone.
achievements: Improved customer satisfaction (CSAT) from 84 to 93 percent over 18 months by introducing a structured QA framework.
Reduced average first-response time from 6 hours to 90 minutes while the team handled 9,000 tickets per month.
Coached a team of 11 agents and cut attrition by 30 percent through a new onboarding and mentoring program.

experiences.title: Senior Support Agent
experiences.description: Handled escalations and complex cases for a high-volume e-commerce support team.
achievements: Resolved around 60 tickets per day with a 97 percent customer-satisfaction rating.
Authored 40 knowledge-base articles that reduced repeat contacts on top issues by 25 percent.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in Business & Communications

jobPosting.title: Customer Support Manager
jobPosting.fullText: Aerlink Digital Services is a fast-scaling fintech with 260 employees serving over 400,000 customers across Europe. We are hiring a Customer Support Manager for our Dublin office. Responsibilities: lead a support function of 3 team leads and around 25 agents, own CSAT, SLA and first-response targets across all channels, drive automation and self-service improvements, and report on support performance to senior leadership. Requirements: several years of customer-support experience with at least 2 in a leadership role, strong command of helpdesk platforms and analytics, and a track record of improving service metrics. We offer hybrid work, a clear career framework, and an annual wellbeing allowance. Your point of contact is Ms. Niamh O'Sullivan, Head of Customer Experience. Please share your earliest available start date.
